chunks.text: Technical Reports - Albert Pisano. Characterization of Advective Micromolding in Vapor-Permeable Templates for Printed Electronics (EECS-2015-149) John Herr.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report by Albert Pisano?
chunks.answer: Characterization of Advective Micromolding in Vapor-Permeable Templates for Printed Electronics.
